title: vigna repens var. angustifolia
intro: Vigna repens var. angustifolia, also known as the creeping cowpea or narrow-leaved goa bean, is a type of perennial vine in the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Vigna repens var. angustifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies in various parts of the world.
